news.title: Researchers find when retailers wait to reveal prices, shoppers fill in the blanks
news.summary_en: An Iowa State researcher is part of a team that recently set out to investigate a longstanding question among retailers: Is it better to show prices upfront or reveal them later in the buying process? Across various field studies and experiments, the researchers discovered a consistent pattern. When prices aren’t displayed, shoppers fill in the blank themselves — and their estimates are amplified
